# chalk_datasource_postgresql (Resource)

Manages a Chalk PostgreSQL datasource integration.

**Required permissions:** `secrets.write`, `secrets.decrypt`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `database` (Attributes) The PostgreSQL database name (`PGDATABASE`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--database))
- `environment_id` (String) The environment ID that this datasource is scoped to.
- `host` (Attributes) The PostgreSQL server hostname or IP address (`PGHOST`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--host))
- `name` (String) The name of the datasource integration.
- `port` (Attributes) The PostgreSQL server port (`PGPORT`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--port))
- `user` (Attributes) The PostgreSQL user (`PGUSER`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--user))

### Optional

- `config` (Attributes Map) Additional configuration for the datasource. Must not contain keys managed by the named attributes (PGHOST, PGPORT, PGDATABASE, PGUSER, PGPASSWORD). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--config))
- `password` (Attributes) The PostgreSQL password (`PGPASSWORD`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--password))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the datasource integration.

<a id="nestedatt--database"></a>
### Nested Schema for `database`

Optional:

- `literal` (String, Sensitive) A plain-text value.
- `secret_id` (String) The ID of an existing Chalk secret.
